responsibilities: Build and maintain dbt models that transform raw data into clean, reliable, analytics-ready datasets
Design dimensional data models that support self-service analytics across business intelligence tools
Implement automated data quality tests to catch anomalies, duplicates, and broken transformations early
Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements and translate business logic into well-documented data models
Maintain a semantic layer that ensures consistent metric definitions across dashboards and reports
Optimize SQL transformations for query performance and cost efficiency within the cloud data warehouse
Establish version control and CI/CD workflows for analytics code to enable safe, collaborative development
Document data models, metric definitions, and transformation logic to support data democratization efforts
Partner with data engineers to ensure upstream data sources are reliable and properly structured for modeling
Train and support business users on self-service analytics tools and approved data definitions
